title: FeatureSnapshot
description: Computed feature values at a point in time. Produced by FeatureCalculator from one or more MarketEvents.

timestamp_ns.description: Timestamp in nanoseconds since Unix epoch when features were computed.

features.description: Map of feature_name -> value. Keys are strategy-specific.

lookback_window_ms.description: Lookback window used for feature computation in milliseconds.

stale.description: True if features are based on stale market data.

missing_data.description: True if input market data had gaps.
